task_updates.executor_notes: Created `tools/registry.ts` with a single `TOOL_REGISTRY` assembled by spreading the timeline, session, and generation handler records. Verified `executeTool` preserves the monolith's unknown-tool message and timeline version-conflict retry flow, mutates `TimelineState` in place after reload/save, and does not add any blanket `try/catch` around tool execution or DB persistence calls. Local `deno check` remains unavailable because `deno` is not installed.
commands_run: rg -n "TOOL_REGISTRY|executeTool|Unknown tool|loadTimelineState|saveTimelineConfigVersioned|retried after reload|Version conflict prevented applying|try|catch" supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/registry.ts

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `executeTool` preserves the original timeline retry sequence exactly: run tool, attempt versioned save, reload state on conflict, re-run tool, retry save, and emit the same retry/conflict messages. `tools/registry.ts` contains no blanket `try/catch`, so handler throws and DB persistence failures still propagate to the outer loop error path.
